metadata.name: lang2shell
metadata.summary: A Python package to execute natural language commands as Linux shell commands using OpenAI.

functions.name: lang2shell.main.get_shell_type
documentation: Detects the current shell type (e.g., zsh or bash).

functions.name: lang2shell.main.extract_command
documentation: Extracts the shell command from the OpenAI response.

functions.name: lang2shell.main.interpret_command
documentation: Uses OpenAI API to interpret natural language commands into shell commands.

functions.name: lang2shell.main.execute_shell_command
documentation: Executes a shell command in the Linux environment.
